articles.title: Servotech Renewable Power System Q1 Results: PAT jumps 75% YoY; revenue up 58%
articles.excerpt: Servotech Renewable Power System reported a 57.7% YoY revenue increase to ₹216.29 crore for Q1 FY27. Gross profit rose 86.8% to ₹48.56 crore, while PAT climbed 74.5% to ₹7.94 crore, driven mainly by solar products.
articles.summary: Servotech Renewable Power System reported a 57.7% YoY revenue increase to ₹216.29 crore for Q1 FY27. Gross profit rose 86.8% to ₹48.56 crore, while PAT climbed 74.5% to ₹7.94 crore, driven mainly by solar products.
